zh.lifeSummary: Eustachius de Mortein是Eustace de Morteyn和Eincina Ruffus的兒子，於1217年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯。他於大約1217年與Eustachius Mrs. de Mortein在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他去世於1283年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾登斯比享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Eustachius de Mortein是Eustace de Morteyn和Eincina Ruffus的儿子，于1217年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯。他于大约1217年与Eustachius Mrs. de Mortein在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾结婚。他去世于1283年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾登斯比享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mortein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Donovan, Brigid.  Russian Vitaly, Gleb.
Altered form of French   Morin  . This surname is established in LA.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Móráin (see Moran ).

variants.name: Morin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Marcel, Lucien, Emile, Pierre, Andre, Normand, Gilles, Jacques, Fernand, Adrien, Gaetan.

French and Walloon: from a variant of the French personal name   Maurin  ; or a diminutive of   More   2, a nickname for a dark-skinned man. It is also found in England, as a surname of Huguenot origin. Compare   Moran  ,   Morang  ,   Morein  ,   Morong  ,   Morrin  , and   Morrow  .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Eustachius de Mortein was born in 1217, in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Eustace de Morteyn and Eincina Ruffus. He married Eustachius Mrs. de Mortein about 1217, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1283, in Dunsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Eustachius de Mortein est né en 1217, à Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils d’Eustace de Morteyn et Eincina Ruffus. Il a épousé Eustachius Mrs. de Mortein environ 1217, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1283, à Dunsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Eustachius de Mortein wurde 1217 in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Eustace de Morteyn und Eincina Ruffus geboren. Er hat um 1217 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Eustachius Mrs. de Mortein geheiratet. Er starb 1283 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Dunsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Eustachius de Mortein è nato il nel 1217 nel Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Eustace de Morteyn e Eincina Ruffus. Lui sposato Eustachius Mrs. de Mortein circa 1217, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1283, nel Dunsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eustachius de Morteinは1217年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティルスウオルスでEustace de MorteynとEincina Ruffusの息子として生まれた。約1217年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでEustachius Mrs. de Morteinと結婚した。彼は1283年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアダンスビーで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eustachius de Mortein(은)는 1217년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 틸스워스에서 Eustace de Morteyn(와)과 Eincina Ruffus의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1217년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 Eustachius Mrs. de Mortein(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1283년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 던스비에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Eustachius de Mortein nasceu em 1217, em Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Eustace de Morteyn e Eincina Ruffus. Ele casou-se com Eustachius Mrs. de Mortein aproximadamente 1217, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1283, em Dunsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Eustachius de Mortein родился в 1217 г. в местности тилсворт, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Eustace de Morteyn и Eincina Ruffus. Он женился на женщине по имени Eustachius Mrs. de Mortein около 1217 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1283 г. в местности дунсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Eustachius de Mortein nació en 1217, en Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Eustace de Morteyn y Eincina Ruffus. Se casó con Eustachius Mrs. de Mortein aproximadamente 1217, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1283, en Dunsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años.
